query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reading_paths (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  slug VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reading_path_articles (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  readingPathId INT NOT NULL,
  postId INT NOT NULL,
  sortOrder INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (readingPathId) REFERENCES reading_paths(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (postId) REFERENCES posts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS featured_articles (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  postId INT NOT NULL,
  curatorNotes TEXT,
  sortOrder INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (postId) REFERENCES posts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
